name: Auto Credit Group
description_short: Nashville-based Buy Here Pay Here used car dealership offering in-house financing to customers with poor or no credit history, plus conventional loan options and vehicle services.
description_long:
Auto Credit Group is a used car dealership headquartered in Nashville, Tennessee that has positioned itself as a financing solution for consumers rejected by traditional lenders. The company operates a Buy Here Pay Here (BHPH) model where customers purchase vehicles directly from the dealership and make weekly or bi-weekly payments back to Auto Credit Group, rather than to a third-party lender. They also offer conventional financing through partner lenders for customers who qualify.

The company's primary offerings include vehicle sales with in-house financing approval, extended service plans (up to 4 years), in-house maintenance facilities, and nationwide vehicle shipping. They accept customers with bankruptcy, repossession history, zero credit, low credit scores, self-employment income, and other challenging financial situations. All loans—whether BHPH or conventional—are reported to credit bureaus to help customers build credit history. Vehicles come with Carfax certification and optional Carfax Buyback Guarantee certificates.

Auto Credit Group distinguishes itself through same-day vehicle delivery in most cases, flexible income documentation (accepting 1099 and self-employed applicants), multiple payment methods (online, phone, AutoPay, in-person), and an in-house maintenance facility reducing long-term ownership costs. Their messaging emphasizes accessibility and "friendly" service for financially vulnerable populations, explicitly listing acceptance of customers with child support issues, divorce situations, and previous repo history.

The BHPH model carries inherent structural limitations: payment frequency (weekly/bi-weekly) requires active customer engagement, vehicle ownership transfers only after full payment completion, and the financing terms are not disclosed on their website. As a dealership rather than a traditional lender, their primary business model depends on vehicle sales rather than pure lending, which may affect loan structures and transparency compared to regulated lenders.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Same-day vehicle delivery available for approved applicants
Accepts applicants with bankruptcy, repossession, zero credit, and other high-risk profiles explicitly rejected elsewhere
Reports all payments to credit bureaus to help customers build credit scores
In-house financing decisions with fast approval process (1-2-3 step approval)
In-house maintenance facility reduces future repair costs for vehicle owners
Multiple flexible payment options: online, phone, AutoPay, and in-person
Serves self-employed and 1099 workers; accepts difficulty proving traditional income
Extended service plans available (up to 4 years with unlimited miles warranty)
cons: No loan terms, APR, or payment amounts disclosed on website; pricing lacks transparency
BHPH model requires weekly or bi-weekly payments (higher payment frequency than traditional loans)
Vehicle ownership does not transfer until all payments completed; dealership retains title as collateral
Limited to used vehicle inventory only; new vehicles not available
Serves primarily Nashville, TN area and surrounding counties; geographic service limitation
best_for: Consumers with poor credit or no credit history who cannot qualify for traditional auto loans
Self-employed or 1099 workers who struggle to document income conventionally
Individuals with recent bankruptcy, repossession, or serious delinquency seeking transportation and credit rebuilding
Nashville-area residents needing reliable used vehicles with in-house maintenance support
diagnosis: Auto Credit Group is best for consumers in the Nashville area with damaged credit or no credit history who need immediate vehicle access and are willing to accept weekly/bi-weekly payment frequency and deferred ownership in exchange for financing approval. The critical caveat is complete lack of APR, term, and payment transparency on their website—consumers must contact directly to understand true cost of borrowing, and the BHPH model structure (dealership retains title until payoff) carries different risks and benefits than traditional auto loans.
services: Buy Here Pay Here vehicle financing with weekly or bi-weekly payment plans
Conventional auto loan programs through partner lenders
Same-day vehicle delivery and approval in most cases
Extended service plans (up to 4 years, unlimited miles warranty)
Carfax-certified vehicle inventory with optional Buyback Guarantee certificates
Credit bureau reporting on all loans (BHPH and conventional)
Multiple payment methods: online, phone, AutoPay, in-person
Pre-approval with flexible income documentation requirements
Used vehicle inventory searchable by price range and vehicle type
Service to Nashville, Hermitage, Mount Juliet, Lebanon, Smyrna, Murfreesboro, and Dickson
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
